notableEvents.label: Josh Bell pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: White Sox challenged (slide interference), call on the field was overturned: Josh Bell grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Josh Bell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Orlando Arcia pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Orlando Arcia singles on a line drive to right fielder Rikuu Nishida. Kody Clemens out at home on the throw, right fielder Rikuu Nishida to catcher Drew Romo.

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Brooks Lee to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters plunked
notableEvents.detail: Twins challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Tristan Peters hit by pitch. Andrew Benintendi to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill pops out to second baseman Luke Keaschall in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Munetaka Murakami GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Munetaka Murakami grounds into an unassisted double play, first baseman Josh Bell. Sam Antonacci out at 2nd. Munetaka Murakami out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk grounds out sharply, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Josh Bell.
